eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Potter, TX; at 02:38 PM ON APR 27, 2026 Effective until 03:38 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Amarillo Area Office of Emergency Management: Voluntary evacuation has been lifted. You may return to your home. Roads may be blocked or congested, so plan your route accordingly. Stay informed via local news or official channels.
